ideation: This animation sequence portrays a teacher passionately explaining a concept.  The left arm will gesture emphatically, while the right arm will hold a pointer (or book) at waist height throughout.  The sequence emphasizes dynamic movement in the left arm to show engagement and enthusiasm, contrasting with the steady right arm to convey stability and the focus of the lesson. Frame 1 will show the teacher beginning to explain, with the left arm relaxed at their side. Frame 2 will feature the left arm moving outward to emphasize a point.  Frame 3 will show the left arm moving back slightly. Frame 4 will show the left arm completing a gesture. Frame 5 will show the left arm returning to the rest position.

frames.beat: left arm sweeps out, beginning the lesson
left arm pulls back, emphasizing a key point
left arm gestures outward with passion
teacher concludes the explanation, arms return
